subject: chamber diameter
fact: The chamber at the peak of the spire has a diameter of 60 feet.

subject: recalibration duration
fact: The recalibration of the teleportation circle requires multiple arcane successes over ten rounds.
source_quote: multiple arcane successes over ten rounds

subject: combat phase
fact: Felkur successfully navigates the second phase of the recalibration.
source_quote: successfully navigating the second phase of the recalibration

subject: session end time
fact: The session ends on round 4 of the combat.
source_quote: The session ends mid-combat on round 4

subject: remaining combat time
fact: There are 6 more rounds remaining before the portal collapses.
source_quote: with 6 more rounds remaining before the portal collapses

subject: glyph corridor length
fact: The Glyph Corridor is a hallway 50 feet long.

subject: vault dimensions
fact: The Vault of the Spire is a chamber measuring 30 feet by 30 feet.

subject: vault temperature
fact: The Vault of the Spire is kept at a constant temperature of 55 degrees Fahrenheit.
source_quote: kept at a constant 55 degrees Fahrenheit

subject: peak chamber diameter
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning Peak is a chamber 60 feet in diameter.

subject: brooch sale price
fact: Felkur sold the Priceless Brooch to Limping Oric for 45 gold pieces.
source_quote: sold it to Limping Oric for 45 gold pieces

subject: trap tile pattern
fact: The explosive glyphs of warding are placed on prime-numbered floor tiles.

fact: The explosive glyphs of warding are placed on prime-numbered floor tiles.
